name: Wood Kiln
description: Fire raw timber into charcoal and treated wood.

name: Smelting Furnace
description: Smelt raw ores into refined ingots.

name: Blacksmith Forge
description: Hammer ingots into weapons, armor, and tools.

name: Woodland Kitchen
description: Cook gathered ingredients into hearty meals.

name: Test Water Tower
description: THROWAWAY TEST CARD (Phase 4, owner-approved): buff-only station used to exercise the passive-buff plumbing until a real buff station is authored. +50% task speed to the whole area while slotted. Remove once real buff stations exist.

passiveBuff.description: +50% task speed in this area (test buff)
